mappings.reason: Establishing the data recovery process with backup procedures is the foundational capability that BM-01 implements — coverage under Rule 6 as BM-01 performs what 11.1 establishes.
Perform Automated Backups directly performs periodic backups of data, satisfying BM-01's objective to enable system operations resumption after failure.
Protecting recovery data ensures the security of backup data that BM-01 creates — coverage under Rule 7 as BM-01's backup configuration includes protecting recovery data.
Establishing an isolated instance of recovery data shares the same backup configuration lifecycle stage and asset type as BM-01 — coverage under Rule 8.
